Hero.title: ZOOMA

Hero.subtitle: We fully design your website, develop e-commerce stores, and manage your social media with professional campaigns to increase sales — everything you need to succeed under one roof.

Package.title: Stores Package
Package.subtitle: For any store — supermarket, restaurant, watch shop, food stall, or any business big or small. This package is for you!
Package.tagline: Save your spare change every day (35 piasters)

features.f1: Website design showcasing your business, products, services, and prices
features.f2: 10 social media post designs per month
features.f3: Adding your location to Google Maps to appear in searches
features.f4: Receive customer orders directly via WhatsApp or any app you choose
features.f5: Meta advertising campaigns to boost sales (Facebook & Instagram)
features.f6: A plastic QR stand placed in your store for customers to scan
features.f7: Full brand identity: logo, colors, and custom fonts for your store
features.f8: 20 printed business cards with your store info and website
features.f9: Technical support throughout the subscription period

Companies.title: Companies Package
Companies.description: For any company — commercial, service-based, or any type. Contact us directly for subscription details.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: What we offer and why choose us?
About.p1: At Zooma Marketing, we believe that digital success starts with unity and creativity. We are an integrated agency bringing together top-tier developers, web designers, and social media experts to provide comprehensive digital solutions under one roof.
About.f1: Professional management for Meta campaigns and Google Maps to ensure you rank at the top and attract customers.
About.f2: Designing and building your digital identity, including product menus and stores, managed with utmost professionalism.
About.f3: Complete technological solutions for stores and companies at highly competitive and affordable prices.
About.p2: We help you keep pace with the modern era and technological advancements confidently. Our goal is not just to provide a service, but to create a stunning presence and unforgettable experience for any customer interacting with your brand. We are your partner in boosting sales and showcasing your genuine dedication to growing your business to stay ahead of the curve.
About.game_changer: We changed the game and its rules! 🔥 Instead of paying a fortune for these professional services separately, we bundled them all for you at an unbelievable and unbeatable price.
